PROBLEM_FOUND: The original config used GET /api/v3/search?query=... but Mumsnet's API requires POST /api/v3/search with a JSON body + XSRF token. That is why total_candidate_threads=0.

step1_get_xsrf.description: First do a GET on the search page to receive the XSRF-TOKEN cookie, then read it from the cookie jar.
step1_get_xsrf.purpose: Harvest XSRF-TOKEN cookie for use in step 2

step2_search_api.description: POST to /api/v3/search — NOT a GET with query params
step2_search_api.note_on_from_field: Omit 'from' to get all dates, or set to '2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z' for full history

required_headers.User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

step3_thread_content.description: Fetch full thread (OP + all replies) using thread_id from search results

step4_similar_threads.description: Discover additional related threads (optional but recommended for coverage)
